mapper.sql: id, source_code, source_name, source_url, api_url, source_type, status, last_sync_at, created_at, updated_at

id, source_code, model_id, canonical_slug, hugging_face_id, model_name, provider_code, provider_name, model_url, details_path, created_timestamp, model_created_at, description, context_length, modality, input_modalities_json, output_modalities_json, tokenizer, instruct_type, pricing_json, top_provider_json, supported_parameters_json, default_parameters_json, supported_voices_json, knowledge_cutoff, expiration_date, raw_json, normalized_name, model_family, model_type, tags_json, capabilities_json, max_completion_tokens, logical_model_id, sync_status, sync_hash, last_seen_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: select from external_model_sources order by id asc
mapper.insert: insert into external_model_sources(source_code, source_name, source_url, api_url, source_type, status) values(#{sourceCode}, #{sourceName}, #{sourceUrl}, #{apiUrl}, #{sourceType}, #{status})

insert into external_model_items( source_code, model_id, canonical_slug, hugging_face_id, model_name, provider_code, provider_name, model_url, details_path, created_timestamp, model_created_at, description, context_length, modality, input_modalities_json, output_modalities_json, tokenizer, instruct_type, pricing_json, top_provider_json, supported_parameters_json, default_parameters_json, supported_voices_json, knowledge_cutoff, expiration_date, raw_json, normalized_name, model_family, model_type, tags_json, capabilities_json, max_completion_tokens, logical_model_id, sync_status, sync_hash, last_seen_at ) values ( #{sourceCode}, #{modelId}, #{canonicalSlug}, #{huggingFaceId}, #{modelName}, #{providerCode}, #{providerName}, #{modelUrl}, #{detailsPath}, #{createdTimestamp}, #{modelCreatedAt}, #{description}, #{contextLength}, #{modality}, #{inputModalitiesJson}, #{outputModalitiesJson}, #{tokenizer}, #{instructType}, #{pricingJson}, #{topProviderJson}, #{supportedParametersJson}, #{defaultParametersJson}, #{supportedVoicesJson}, #{knowledgeCutoff}, #{expirationDate}, #{rawJson}, #{normalizedName}, #{modelFamily}, #{modelType}, #{tagsJson}, #{capabilitiesJson}, #{maxCompletionTokens}, #{logicalModelId}, #{syncStatus}, #{syncHash}, #{lastSeenAt} )
mapper.update: update external_model_items set canonical_slug = #{canonicalSlug}, hugging_face_id = #{huggingFaceId}, model_name = #{modelName}, provider_code = #{providerCode}, provider_name = #{providerName}, model_url = #{modelUrl}, details_path = #{detailsPath}, created_timestamp = #{createdTimestamp}, model_created_at = #{modelCreatedAt}, description = #{description}, context_length = #{contextLength}, modality = #{modality}, input_modalities_json = #{inputModalitiesJson}, output_modalities_json = #{outputModalitiesJson}, tokenizer = #{tokenizer}, instruct_type = #{instructType}, pricing_json = #{pricingJson}, top_provider_json = #{topProviderJson}, supported_parameters_json = #{supportedParametersJson}, default_parameters_json = #{defaultParametersJson}, supported_voices_json = #{supportedVoicesJson}, knowledge_cutoff = #{knowledgeCutoff}, expiration_date = #{expirationDate}, raw_json = #{rawJson}, normalized_name = #{normalizedName}, model_family = #{modelFamily}, model_type = #{modelType}, tags_json = #{tagsJson}, capabilities_json = #{capabilitiesJson}, max_completion_tokens = #{maxCompletionTokens}, sync_status = #{syncStatus}, sync_hash = #{syncHash}, last_seen_at = #{lastSeenAt} where id = #{id}
